en.value: Goal: By 2028, as a result of DCA’s and partners’ works, most marginalized and vulnerable communities and their organisations are empowered, resilient and protected to claim their rights to participation and justice and have access to public and private sector services and resources.Outcomes/ Objectives:1. Communities affected by crisis are protected, have the resilience to prevent, withstand and recover from shocks.2. Communities have adapted to climate change and resilient livelihoods, are included in green and sustainable food and market systems.3. People know and claim human rights and basic freedoms and influence decisions affecting their everyday lives.4. Staff enhanced capacity, adapted new technology and equipment, have resources, plans/policies/frameworks to implement the Project.Outputs:1.   Increased capacity of local humanitarian actors to lead preparedness and risk informed humanitarian actions.2. Right holders have enhanced food security, livelihood options and agroecology system-based adaptation services.3. Rights holders including EHRDs, and their groups and networks are capacitated to voice their concern and exercise their rights.4. Duty Bearers including private sectors at the local and provincial level enhanced; allocate adequate resources; strengthen quality public services and formulate and implement inclusive Policy/programmes for economic empowerment, climate smart technologies, promote youth on DRR and CCA.

en.full: AGRATA: Advancing Green, Resilient and Accessible resources and Services for communities and Amplifying sustainability in Nepal.

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
